class.name: ScheduledAudioStreamPlayer
class.brief_description: A node for scheduled audio playback.
class.description: Behaves similarly to [AudioStreamPlayer] but can schedule audio to play in the future.

method.name: cancel_scheduled_playback
method.description: Cancels the scheduled playback if it has not yet started. Does nothing if it has already started.

method.name: is_playback_scheduled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the playback is scheduled and has not yet started.

method.name: play_scheduled
method.description: Schedules a sound to be played on the [AudioServer]'s timeline at [param absolute_time] in seconds. If the sound is scheduled to play earlier than the value returned by [method AudioServer.get_absolute_time], it will be played immediately. The sound starts from the given [param from_position] in seconds. Use this method for high precision playbacks, such as a metronome or other rhythm-based sounds. Returns an [AudioStreamPlayback] instance representing the scheduled playback of the sound. [b]Note:[/b] Calling this method after [member AudioStreamPlayer.max_polyphony] is reached will cut off the oldest sound playing on this node. [b]Note:[/b] On the Web platform, [member AudioStreamPlayer.playback_type] must be set to [constant AudioServer.PLAYBACK_TYPE_STREAM]. Otherwise, this method will behave like [method AudioStreamPlayer.play].

method.name: play_scheduled_relative
method.description: Schedules a sound to be played relative to another playback's timeline. If the sound is scheduled to play earlier than the other playback's current playback position, it will be played immediately. The sound starts from the given [param from_position] in seconds. Use this method for high precision playbacks, such as a metronome or other rhythm-based sounds. Returns an [AudioStreamPlayback] instance representing the scheduled playback of the sound. [b]Note:[/b] Calling this method after [member AudioStreamPlayer.max_polyphony] is reached will cut off the oldest sound playing on this node. [b]Note:[/b] On the Web platform, [member AudioStreamPlayer.playback_type] must be set to [constant AudioServer.PLAYBACK_TYPE_STREAM]. Otherwise, this method will behave like [method AudioStreamPlayer.play].

method.name: set_scheduled_end_time
method.description: Sets the scheduled end time of an already scheduled playback.

method.name: set_scheduled_start_time
method.description: Sets the scheduled start time of an already scheduled playback.
